title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 276.581 - Bonds may be copayable to another state
text:
276.581.  Bonds may be copayable to another state. — Any bond required by sections 276.401 to 276.581 may be made copayable to any state with whom Missouri has entered into contracts or agreements as authorized by section 276.566, for the benefit of sellers of grain in that state.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1627 § 36)
